title: The Government Savings Promotion Act, 1873
full_text: The Government Savings Promotion Act, 1873 सरकारी बचत संवर्धन अधिनियम, 1873 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187305 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1873-01-28 Act Year: 1873 Short Title: The Government Savings Promotion Act, 1873 Hindi Title: सरकारी बचत संवर्धन अधिनियम, 1873 Long Title: An Act to regulate Irrigation, Navigation and Drainage Northern India.
